channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One Killed, 13 Injured in Shalimar Express Collision with Goods Train in Naushahro Feroze, Inquiry Ordered
item.description: On Sunday, March 15, 2026, the Lahore-bound Shalimar Express collided with a stationary goods train at Lakha Road Railway Station in Naushahro Feroze district, Sindh. The accident happened when the in...

item.title: ACT-Wazalendo and CCM make steady progress in Zanzibar political talks
item.description: In Zanzibar, ACT-Wazalendo party, under its national chairman Othman Masoud Othman (OMO), dey optimistic say political reconciliation with ruling CCM dey move well. OMO, while talking to members and c...

item.title: Weather Forecast: Rain Expected in Select Counties While Most of Kenya Remains Dry
item.description: Nairobi – The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued the daily weather forecast covering 24 hours from 9pm Sunday, March 15, to 9pm Monday, March 16. Most parts of the country will enjoy sun...

item.title: Shalimar Express collides with parked goods train in Naushahro Feroze, one killed
item.description: On Sunday, the Lahore-bound Shalimar Express met with an unfortunate accident at Lakha Road Railway Station in Naushahro Feroze, Sindh. According to local authorities, one person lost his life, identi...

item.title: Edo Lawmaker Urges Lawmakers to Engage Constituents Beyond Assembly Walls
item.description: Anamero Dekeri, wey dey represent Etsako Federal Constituency for House of Representatives, don talk say make legislative work no just stop for National Assembly debates alone. Over weekend for Abuja,...

item.title: Oscars 2026 live coverage: red carpet arrivals, fashion, political statements and ceremony updates
item.description: The Guardian's live blog for the 98th Academy Awards on 15 March 2026 captures the excitement surrounding Hollywood's biggest night, hosted once again by Conan O’Brien. The ceremony promises a more po...

item.title: Analysis of West Bengal Poll Phases and Their Impact on Trinamool and BJP Contest
item.description: The West Bengal elections are being conducted in two separate phases, a strategy that appears to offer certain advantages to the Trinamool Congress in its challenge against the BJP. The phased polling...

item.title: New Halifax venue Backlot HFX aims to expand queer nightlife on Gottingen Street
item.description: Halifax is experiencing a revival of its queer nightlife with the upcoming opening of Backlot HFX, a new two-storey bar located at 2103 Gottingen Street. Michael Gouthro, the owner, hopes the venue wi...

item.title: Winnie Byanyima’s journey from rural Uganda to global leadership in gender justice and development
item.description: This article traces the life journey of Winnie Byanyima, a Ugandan aeronautical engineer, politician and feminist who rose from humble rural beginnings to become a major voice in global justice and de...

item.title: Former SAPS Task Force Member Arrested in Connection with Witness D Murder
item.description: A former member of the elite South African Police Service (SAPS) task force has been arrested in connection with the murder of Marius van der Merwe, popularly known as Witness D. The arrest was made b...

item.title: British-Pakistani woman embarks on long motorbike ride from London to Lahore to support women’s empowerment
item.description: Guliafshan Tariq, a British-Pakistani motorbike enthusiast, has begun a historic journey from London to Lahore, becoming the first woman to undertake this ambitious ride. Based in Manchester with her ...

item.title: Nairobi Freelance Videographer Found Dead in Naivasha After Strangulation
item.description: A postmortem examination has confirmed that Nairobi-based freelance videographer Joseph Owino, known as Myles, died from strangulation. His body was discovered along the Naivasha–Mai Mahiu Road on Mar...

item.title: Tanzania PM launches probe over patients paying for medicines despite hospital stock in Katavi
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba of Tanzania has demanded a thorough investigation into the situation at health centres in Mpimbwe District, Katavi Region, after reports showed patients being asked t...

item.title: US Energy Secretary Predicts Possible Short-Term Resolution to Iran Conflict
item.description: The US Energy Secretary has expressed optimism that the ongoing conflict involving Iran may conclude within the next few weeks. Meanwhile, Iran is reportedly considering allowing ships linked to China...

item.title: Osun Monarch Honoured with Honorary Doctorate by US University for Cultural Contributions
item.description: The Alayemore of Ido-Osun, Oba Oyetunde Ishola Jokotola, don receive Honorary Doctorate Degree in Arts (Culture and Tradition) from Bradley University, Illinois, United States. Bradley University conf...

item.title: Man killed in early morning shooting in Lidcombe, Sydney
item.description: In an early morning incident in Lidcombe, a suburb in western Sydney, a man was fatally shot. The attack occurred before dawn, and emergency services were promptly called to the scene. Authorities are...

item.title: All Six Crew Members Identified After US Refueling Plane Crash in Iraq
item.description: The identities of all six US military personnel who died in a refueling plane crash over western Iraq on March 12, 2026, have been released. The Boeing KC-135 aircraft, operating in friendly airspace,...

item.title: Investigation under way after newborn baby girl falls to her death in Westminster
item.description: Tragic events unfolded on Saturday morning in central London when an 18-day-old baby girl fell from a third-floor window of a building in the Peabody Estate on Horseferry Road, Westminster. Emergency ...

item.title: Nigeria Receives Full PSC Revenue Following Implementation of Tinubu’s Executive Order
item.description: In February 2026, Nigeria’s Federation Account finally received full remittances from Production Sharing Contracts (PSC) thanks to President Bola Tinubu’s Executive Order 9, which was signed earlier i...

item.title: Poilievre introduces plan to boost Canadian auto production and harmonize trade with the U.S.
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has announced a comprehensive plan aimed at strengthening Canada's automotive sector while seeking tariff-free access to the U.S. market. Presented in Windsor, Ont...
